# Librarium — Warhammer Book Library

> A reference catalog of Warhammer 40,000 and Horus Heresy novels, short stories, and audio dramas. Browse the chronicles of the Warhammer universe by book, series, author, or Primarch.

## Navigation

- [Books](https://librarium40k.com/books): Complete catalog of Warhammer 40k and Horus Heresy novels
- [Series](https://librarium40k.com/series): Multi-book series and recommended reading orders
- [Authors](https://librarium40k.com/authors): Black Library authors and their works
- [Primarchs](https://librarium40k.com/primarchs): The twenty Primarchs of the Emperor's legions

## About

Librarium is a reference resource for readers of Warhammer fiction published by Black Library, covering authors such as Dan Abnett, Graham McNeill, Aaron Dembski-Bowden, Guy Haley, James Swallow, and others. The catalog includes standalone novels, ongoing series like Gaunt's Ghosts and Ultramarines, and the Horus Heresy / Siege of Terra arcs.

## API

The underlying data is served by a public REST API at https://warhammer-books-api.onrender.com/api/v1 with endpoints for /books, /authors, /series, and /primarchs.

## Extended Reference

Full content index with individual book, author, and series passages:
https://librarium40k.com/llms-full.txt
